category_title: Minimally verbal young children with severe ASD and language processing deficits
scenario_title: Vocal imitation task with vowel sounds
minimal_context: The student and therapist are sitting one-on-one using picture cards to practice imitating the vowel sounds /a/, /i/, and /u/.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Here is a picture card with a drawing. Say /a/.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Does not sustain eye contact with the therapist and reaches for the bubbles on the table, making no sound.)

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Engages in exploratory play by tapping the picture card, showing minimal communicative intent and producing no meaningful vocalizations.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's look at this next drawing. Say /i/.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Shows a reduced response, failing to participate in joint attention or imitate the adult's model, and does not produce any meaningful words.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Here is a picture card with a drawing. Say /a/.

STUDENT: (Does not sustain eye contact with the therapist and reaches for the bubbles on the table, making no sound.)

TUTOR: Look here. Try to say /a/.

STUDENT: (Engages in exploratory play by tapping the picture card, showing minimal communicative intent and producing no meaningful vocalizations.)

TUTOR: Let's look at this next drawing. Say /i/.

STUDENT: (Shows a reduced response, failing to participate in joint attention or imitate the adult's model, and does not produce any meaningful words.)

task.content: Imitate vocalizations of vowel sounds, /a/, /i/ and /u/

context.materials: Picture cards with drawings of the targeted vocal shapes, picture cards with oromotor expressions, bubbles for blowing and popping

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When prompted to imitate the adult's model of vowel sounds
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Showed reduced responses, did not produce any meaningful vocalizations and words, and was found to only able to imitate the vocalizations of the chosen sounds 10% to 20% of the time

behavior_patterns.condition: During assessment and intervention tasks requiring communication
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Lack of abilities to sustain eye contact, to participate in joint attention
